user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable employees to add and view other employees' calendars, so that team members can coordinate schedules
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Configure Calendar screen; When I set "Enable employee to add/view other's calendar?" to Yes and click Save; Then employees can access and add events to other calendars

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to allow the reporting manager hierarchy to view an employee's calendar events, so that managers have visibility into their team's schedules
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Configure Calendar screen; When I set the reporting manager hierarchy option to Yes; Then it overrides the employee's privacy preferences and managers can view the events

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to allow HR to view an employee's calendar events, so that HR can oversee organization-wide scheduling
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Configure Calendar screen; When I set "HR can view employee's calendar events?" to Yes; Then it overrides the employee's privacy preferences and HR can view the events

user_story: As an HR admin, I want event based announcements to be visible on the calendar, so that employees see relevant announcements in context
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Configure Calendar screen; When I set the event based announcements option to Yes and Save; Then announcements appear on the calendar

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save my calendar accessibility configuration, so that the chosen visibility settings are persisted
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set the calendar accessibility options; When I click Save; Then the configuration is stored and applied
